sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n264" key="a)gaqotuxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαθοτυχέω</orth>, Astrol., <sense id="n264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupy the house of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγαθὴ τύχη,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:83:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83.20</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγ. πρός</foreign>. . <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
